name: Filet of Beef with Green Peppercorn Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small skillet over high heat.
2. Add the butter and swirl it until melted.
3. Add the filets and sauté until browned on both sides for 4-5 minutes per side (for medium rare, using a 3/4 inch thick filet).
4. Remove the filets to a plate and tent with foil.
5. Add shallots and mustard; sauté for 1 minute without browning.
6. Deglaze the pan with Madeira.
7. Reduce heat to medium-low and add heavy cream, cooking until heated through (about 1 minute).
8. Add peppercorns and gently crush them with the back of a wooden spoon to release flavor.
9. Season with salt and white pepper as desired.
10. Raise the heat and cook until just thickened.
11. Serve filets with sauce spooned over top and garnish with sautéed mushroom caps.
12. Serve with roasted new potatoes seasoned with rosemary, garlic, and parsley, and buttered baby carrots.
